title: Open or Close the Secondary IDE Window
breadcrumbs: Open or Close the Secondary IDE Window
text: Open or Close the Secondary IDE Window The Uniface IDE allows you to have two windows open at the same time. The secondary window cannot contain the output tabs. You can move an editor between windows using the editor tab's context menu. Figure 1. Switch Window Button To open the secondary window, right-click an editor tab (or the start page tab) and choose Move to Other Window from the context menu. If there is no secondary window yet, it is automatically started and the editor is opened in the secondary window. To close the secondary window, you can: Click the X button in the title bar of the window. When only one editor is open in the secondary window, right-click the tab and choose Close Editor from the context menu. The secondary window is automatically closed and focus is returned to the main window. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
